name: Agent Evolve
description: Observes agent failures, proposes LLM-driven workspace mutations, validates with fitness tests, and git-tags successful evolutions. Inspired by A-Evolve.

enabled.label: Enable Agent Evolve
enabled.help: Master switch for the agent evolution system.

minObservationsBeforeEvolve.label: Min Observations
minObservationsBeforeEvolve.help: Minimum observation records before an evolution cycle can run.

fitnessThreshold.label: Fitness Threshold
fitnessThreshold.help: Gate pass threshold: postScore must be >= preScore * threshold (0-1).

testPrompts.label: Test Prompts
testPrompts.help: Map of agentId to test prompt strings used for fitness gating.

autoEvolveSchedule.label: Auto-Evolve Schedule
autoEvolveSchedule.help: Optional cron expression to run evolution cycles automatically.
